source.name: State Secretariat for Migration (SEM) — Entry & residence for study

extraSources.name: University of Zurich — Visa & residence guidelines

requirements.label: University admission
requirements.detail: Admission to a recognised Swiss higher-education institution.

requirements.label: Proof of funds
requirements.detail: Show about CHF 21,000 for the academic year; some cantons (e.g. Geneva, Zurich) request up to CHF 24,000.

requirements.label: Swiss health insurance
requirements.detail: Health insurance is mandatory; you must take out a recognised Swiss plan (or an approved exemption) after arrival.

requirements.label: Language proof
requirements.detail: German/French/Italian for local-language programmes, or IELTS/TOEFL for English-taught.

requirements.label: Valid passport
requirements.detail: A passport valid for the residence-permit period.

requirements.label: Proof of accommodation
requirements.detail: Evidence of accommodation in Switzerland is usually requested.

requirements.label: Tuition / funds transfer
requirements.detail: Transfer fees or living funds with a low-FX provider.

requirements.label: Connectivity on arrival
requirements.detail: An eSIM gives you a Swiss number and data on landing.
